context: NIRF 2025 rankings released September 2025 by Ministry of Education. State-wise top colleges across Engineering, Medical, Law, Commerce, Management, Design, Science, and Liberal Arts. Streams field enables Excel-style filtering.

colleges.name: IIT Tirupati
colleges.ap_specific: Only IIT in Andhra Pradesh — strong choice for AP students.

colleges.name: NIT Warangal
colleges.ap_specific: Telangana neighbour — popular with AP MPC students.

colleges.name: IIIT Hyderabad
colleges.ap_specific: Top destination for AP and Telangana CSE aspirants — many product companies recruit on par with IITs.

colleges.name: IIIT Sri City
colleges.ap_specific: Located in AP — strong choice for AP students wanting an IIIT close to home.

colleges.name: VIT-AP Amaravati
colleges.ap_specific: VIT campus inside AP — popular fall-back if JEE/EAPCET ranks are middling.

colleges.name: SRM University AP
colleges.ap_specific: SRM campus in AP — alternate to VIT-AP.

colleges.name: Andhra University (College of Engineering)
colleges.ap_specific: Government-fees, RTF-eligible (Post-Matric Scholarship) — most affordable engineering option for AP students.

colleges.name: JNTU Kakinada
colleges.ap_specific: Conducts AP EAPCET. Constituent colleges across AP.

colleges.name: AIIMS New Delhi
colleges.ap_specific: AIIMS Mangalagiri (Guntur, AP) is also operational.

colleges.name: AIIMS Mangalagiri
colleges.ap_specific: AP's AIIMS — operational since 2019.

colleges.name: Sri Venkateswara Institute of Medical Sciences (SVIMS)
colleges.ap_specific: AP's premier government medical institute.

colleges.name: NALSAR University of Law
colleges.ap_specific: Closest top-3 NLU to AP — culturally accessible.

colleges.name: DSNLU Visakhapatnam
colleges.ap_specific: AP's only NLU. Strong choice for AP students who clear CLAT.

colleges.name: IIM Indore (IPM)
colleges.ap_specific: After Class 12 — IPMAT path available without waiting for graduation.

colleges.name: IIFT Kakinada (5-yr IPM)
colleges.ap_specific: IIFT campus inside AP, accepts IPMAT scores. Largely unknown to most AP students.

colleges.name: Shaheed Sukhdev College of Business Studies (SSCBS) — DU
colleges.notes: Best BMS program in Delhi. Entry via CUET UG (replaces DU JAT).

colleges.name: IISER Tirupati
colleges.ap_specific: AP's IISER. Best science research school within the state.

colleges.name: IIST Thiruvananthapuram
colleges.notes: ISRO's nursery — best path to ISRO scientist.

colleges.name: TIFR Mumbai
colleges.notes: Fully-funded research career; PhD-track from BSc.

colleges.name: Ashoka University
colleges.financial_aid: Up to 100% need-based via Ashoka Aid

colleges.name: Krea University
colleges.ap_specific: Located in AP (Sri City) — leading liberal arts college within the state.

colleges.name: NID Andhra Pradesh
colleges.ap_specific: First NID in South India — operational and growing.

colleges.name: School of Planning and Architecture, Delhi
National Defence Academy (NDA)
colleges.notes: Tri-services training academy. Tuition + everything fully borne by Government of India.

colleges.name: Sainik School Korukonda
colleges.ap_specific: AP's primary defence-pipeline school.

colleges.name: Sainik School Kalikiri
colleges.ap_specific: Second Sainik School in AP.

colleges.name: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University
colleges.ap_specific: AP's main agricultural university.
